positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The composition features massive, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms intertwined with sweeping, stylized willow branches and crystalline flora. The dominant color palette is deep indigo, vibrant teal, and luminous gold accents. The style should be high-contrast, neo-Victorian etching meets Art Nouveau watercolor, giving the feeling of ancient, magical secrets. Focus on clean, thick outlines and strong silhouettes against a dark background. Optimal for print on apparel, centered composition, dramatic overhead diffuse lighting, rule of thirds for visual balance, 4k detail.
